topStories.description: Iran has rejected the US move outright, with its Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei saying the country is "not 'blockadable'".

topStories.title: US, Iran Consider Extending Ceasefire To Buy Time For Peace Talks: Report
topStories.description: Tensions remain particularly high over Hormuz, a critical waterway for oil and gas that's been effectively shuttered since the start of the war almost seven weeks ago.

topStories.title: TIME 100 most influential people 2026: Trump, Xi, Netanyahu in world leaders list redefining global order
topStories.description: This year’s TIME100 features a diverse mix of global and US leaders, from Xi Jinping and Benjamin Netanyahu to Donald Trump and Marco Rubio, underscoring their influence on geopolitics and policy.

dailyNews.title: Vance tells Pope Leo XIV to be ‘careful’ on theology after criticism of US foreign policy
dailyNews.description: “I think it’s very, very important for the pope to be careful when he talks about matters of theology,” Vance said.

dailyNews.title: Pakistani army chief in Tehran amid bid to restart US talks
dailyNews.description: Pakistan’s army chief has arrived in Iran for high-level talks aimed at reviving negotiations between Iran and the US.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan army chief in Tehran to advance next round of US-Iran talks
dailyNews.description: Sources tell Al Jazeera that Pakistani mediators are hopeful about a breakthrough on Iran's nuclear programme.

dailyNews.title: US Tax Day 2026: Millions use ‘no tax on tips,’ overtime deductions, average refunds $3,462
dailyNews.description: The Internal Revenue Service reported that the average tax refund stands at $3,462, up about 11% ($350) from last year’s $3,116.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo visits Cameroon with message of peace amid attacks from Trump
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump has lashed out at pope over calls for peace and criticism of US war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Feds will require data centers to show their power bills
dailyNews.description: In a first, the U.S. Energy Information Agency said it will require data centers to disclose details of their energy use.

dailyNews.title: What is Trump-backed SAVE America Act and what could it mean for US vote?
dailyNews.description: US Senate resumes debate on controversial bill requiring more proof of citizenship, which Trump calls top priority.

dailyNews.title: Iran Bought Chinese Satellite In Orbit, Then Used It To Target US Bases
dailyNews.description: The satellite, known as TEE-01B, was developed and launched by the Chinese firm Earth Eye Co. before being taken over by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' Aerospace Force.

dailyNews.title: US Says Won't Renew Sanctions Waiver On Iranian, Russian Oil
dailyNews.description: The waiver was only for oil that was on the water prior to March 11, the US Treasury Secretary said.

dailyNews.title: Mark Mobius, emerging markets investing pioneer and Franklin Templeton veteran, passes away at 89
dailyNews.description: Mobius spent over three decades with Franklin Templeton Investments, where he became a leading advocate for investing in developing economies across Asia, Africa, Latin America, and Eastern Europe.

dailyNews.title: Asim Munir 'de facto Pak leader': Ex-minister says Trump did not bother to talk about Shehbaz Sharif during Iran talks
dailyNews.description: Pakistan has positioned itself as a mediator in US-Iran talks, with Field Marshal Asim Munir playing a prominent role. His reported ties with Donald Trump and involvement in diplomacy highlight shifting regional dynamics.

dailyNews.title: Is Iran beating the US at its own propaganda game?
dailyNews.description: Iran has condemned a ban imposed by YouTube on a pro-Iranian group that releases Lego-style AI videos.

dailyNews.title: US blockade at Strait of Hormuz continues, 9 vessels made to return to Iranian ports in 48 hours, says CENTCOM
dailyNews.description: US blockade at Strait of Hormuz continues, 9 vessels made to return to Iranian ports in 48 hours, says CENTCOM

dailyNews.title: Trump administration's Federal Reserve HQ probe escalates with unannounced site visit by prosecutors
dailyNews.description: Deputies from Jeanine Pirro's office showed up unannounced at the Federal Reserve's D.C. construction site as part of a probe tied to Jerome Powell.

dailyNews.title: Airline unveils stacked bunk bed 'pods' as backlash builds over pricey, cramped way to fly
dailyNews.description: Air New Zealand is launching Skynest, a first-of-its-kind lie-flat sleeping pod option for economy travelers on its longest international flights. Travelers had mixed reactions.

dailyNews.title: LIV Golf's end may be imminent as report signals Saudi Arabia is preparing to cut off funding
dailyNews.description: Reports suggest Saudi Arabia could end its financial backing of LIV Golf, putting the breakaway league’s future entirely in jeopardy.

dailyNews.title: DC curfew ends as teen takeover fears clock in – city braces for chaos amid spring break mayhem
dailyNews.description: Washington, D.C.'s emergency juvenile curfew is set to expire today during spring break, raising concerns about more violent teen takeover events.

dailyNews.title: DC Metro CEO fires back at critics hammering him for picture with National Guard troops
dailyNews.description: Metro CEO Randy Clarke drew criticism for a social media post celebrating the relationship between his employees and National Guard troops in Washington, D.C.

dailyNews.title: ‘Dukes of Hazzard’ star Catherine Bach stuns fans in new photo after reported hospitalization
dailyNews.description: Catherine Bach, who played Daisy Duke on "The Dukes of Hazzard," looks radiant at 72 in new Instagram photos following a reported health scare in October.

dailyNews.title: Tigers sign top prospect Kevin McGonigle to $150 million extension just 17 games into career
dailyNews.description: The Detroit Tigers announced they signed rookie shortstop Kevin McGonigle to an eight-year, $150 million extension just 17 games into his big league career.

dailyNews.title: Hunter Biden trashes Democratic leadership, hails Gavin Newsom as party's 'greatest warrior'
dailyNews.description: Hunter Biden called California Gov. Gavin Newsom the greatest warrior the Democratic Party has and said leadership in the party has been frustrating during an interview Wednesday.

topStories.title: Billy Ray Cyrus defends Trump, says being commander in chief is a 'tough job'
topStories.description: Country music star Billy Ray Cyrus called the presidency a "tough job" and defends Trump, saying he respects the office regardless of political party.

topStories.title: GOP holds with Trump on Iran war, but cracks emerge as deadline nears
topStories.description: Senate Republicans block a fourth war powers resolution on Trump's Iran war, but questions grow as the 60-day congressional deadline approaches.

topStories.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt hits Democrats for allegedly knowing about rape accusations against former Rep. Eric Swalwell and staying silent.

topStories.title: Leavitt shows off US Triumphal Arch, with plans to be released Thursday
topStories.description: President Trump's proposed 250-foot United States Triumphal Arc would rise on Columbia Island in the Potomac River to mark America's 250th birthday.

topStories.title: Trump Breaks With Meloni, Italy’s Leader, Amid Dispute Over Pope and Iran
topStories.description: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was once considered one of President Trump’s closest European allies. Their friendship now appears in danger.

topStories.title: Trump’s Quest for More Sway Over Fed Faces Fresh Hurdles
topStories.description: Jerome H. Powell’s term as chair of the Federal Reserve ends on May 15, but it appears increasingly likely that he will stay on in some capacity at the central bank after that.

topStories.title: Trump’s Go-To Justification for Contentious Decisions: National Security
topStories.description: The administration has invoked national security in a variety of matters, including the White House ballroom and offshore wind farms, drawing rebukes from some judges.

dailyNews.description: Presidents can fight with popes. God is another matter.

dailyNews.title: Greenland's prime minister on Trump's threats: 'A lot of people don't feel safe'
dailyNews.description: In an interview with NBC News, Greenlandic Prime Minister Jens-Frederik Nielsen said President Trump's push for the U.S. to take control of the Danish territory has put "unacceptable pressure" on his people who "don't feel safe" when the threats are posted.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo's feud with Trump overshadows his spiritual homecoming
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo XIV traveled to St. Augustine's hometown in Algeria only for the trip to be overshadowed by his feud with President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance.

dailyNews.title: Greenland PM: People 'don't feel safe' after Trump threats
dailyNews.description: Greenlandic Prime Minister Jens-Frederik Nielsen says many Greenlanders "don't feel safe" amid President Trump's repeated push to take control of the semi-autonomous Danish territory.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran wants 'to make a deal very badly'
dailyNews.description: Trump says Iran wants 'to make a deal very badly'

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: Senate rejects 4th attempt to curb Trump's war powers in Iran
dailyNews.description: It was the fourth time Democrats in the Senate had forced a vote on the issue since the war began on Feb. 28.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war "close to over" amid push for new peace talks
dailyNews.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

dailyNews.title: Why Jerome Powell — not Trump — will decide when the Fed chief steps down
dailyNews.description: President Trump would love to be finally rid of Fed Chair Jerome Powell. But firing him would kick up a legal firestorm and roil financial markets, experts said.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Bessent, Loeffler and Leavitt take questions on inflation, Iran and more at briefing
dailyNews.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Small Business Administration administrator Kelly Loeffler and White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt spoke to reporters Wednesday about a wide range of issues at the White House press briefing. CBS News political reporter Zak Hudak provided analysis following the news conference.

dailyNews.title: Leavitt discusses "Arc de Trump" at White House briefing
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt spoke about President Trump's proposed triumphal arch near Arlington National Cemetery on Wednesday. See her remarks.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Mike Waltz says Trump's threat to end Iran's civilization helped engage regime
dailyNews.description: Mike Waltz, the U.S. ambassador to the United Nations, testified before the Senate Committee on Foreign Relations and said President Trump's threat to end Iran's civilization helped engage Iran.
